commands.review_summary:
The PR recovers corrupt first-line session JSONL headers, writes a same-mode corrupt backup, rewrites the active transcript, and adds session-manager and run-preparation regression tests.

PR surface: Source +103, Tests +224. Total +327 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main skips the corrupt header, returns no valid entries, and rewrites the non-empty session file from `setSessionFile()`. I did not run a repro because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can fix the remaining blocker by changing corrupt backup naming/classification and adding focused coverage.
